market_data.tracked_funding_2025_2026: $4.6B+ across Skild, Figure, Physical Intelligence, NEURA Robotics, General Intuition, Memories.ai, TwelveLabs, Rerun

recent_developments.description: NEURA Robotics announced up to $1.4B in Series C financing led by Tether, making it one of the largest humanoid robotics and Physical AI rounds.
